extraction.one_line_summary: ARMY Sander attacked from a 5-rider breakaway 600m from finish on final 7% climb, winning while FROOME counter-attacked final 500m in favorites group to gain time on NIBALI.
tactical_patterns: ARU fabricated 1-minute solo gap via Astana attack on Collado Alba despite Contador/de la Cruz/Sanchez Spanish Armada counter-moves.
FROOME reversed defensive posture with final 500m attack despite having three teammates, gaining time on isolated NIBALI.
Breakaway's 14-minute gap suggests Team Sky calculated no GC threat from escapees, allowing complete freedom on medium mountain stage.

rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: held 1-minute solo gap for 25km after Collado Alba attack, resisting Froome's trio until final kilometer
rider_signals.FROOME Christopher: positive: retained three teammates at 25km despite multiple Spanish attacks, then personally attacked for bonus seconds
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: isolated and unable to follow Froome's final 500m acceleration, losing 21 seconds to direct GC rival
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: chased ARU on Collado Alba but failed to bridge, only matched Froome's final kick without gaining
rider_signals.ARMY Sander: positive: tactical patience in breakaway quintet before 600m attack suggests experienced judgment on 7% gradients
